 min-width:unset;
}

#section-before-you-travel, #section-on-match-day, #section-between-matches {
	padding-top:84px;
}

body.event-wimbledon .timeline__item {
  display: flex;
}

body.event-wimbledon .timeline__content {
  flex: 1;
  width: 100%;
}

body.event-wimbledon #section-11 {
	padding-top:56px;
}

body.event-wimbledon #section-why-travel-to-wimbledon-with-roadtrips {
	margin-bottom:120px;
}

body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote {
  position: relative;
  margin: 2rem 0;
  padding: 2rem 2rem 2rem 2.5rem;
  border-left: 5px solid #1F4E79;
  background: #F0F6FB;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #6a6c6c;
}

body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote {
	margin-top:-75px;
	margin-left:20px;
}

body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote::before {
  content: "“";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0.4rem;
  left: 1rem;
  font-size: 4rem;
  line-height: 1;
  color: #5f7f3f;
  opacity: 0.25;
}

body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote p {
  margin: 0;
  font-style: italic;
	font-size: 1.2rem;
}

body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote cite {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #6a6c6c;
}

body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote cite::before {
  content: "— ";
}

body.event-wimbledon .inner-subhead {
	font-size:48px;
}

#section-what-is-debenture-seating-at-wimbledon {
	margin-top:20px;
}
.rates__heading {
font-size: var(--global--font-size-xxxxl) !important;
}

#section-what-is-debenture-seating-at-wimbledon .side__media a { 
	width: 70%;
	margin-top: 120px;
	margin-left: 100px;
}

#section-meet-our-wimbledon-experts {
	margin-bottom:0px;
}

#section-upcoming-sporting-events-calendar h2{
	font-size: 42px;
}
#section-upcoming-sporting-events-calendar{
	padding-top: 25px;
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
body.event-wimbledon .inner-subhead {
	font-size:28px;
}
body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote {
	margin:5px;
	margin-left:0px;
	font-size:1rem;
	}
	body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote p {	
		font-size:1.1rem;
	}
#section-what-is-debenture-seating-at-wimbledon .side__media a { 
	margin-top: 0px;
	margin-left: 20px;
}
body.event-wimbledon .wimbledon-quote {
	margin-top:0px;
}
}

					<div class="side__content col-md">

						
						<div class="content"><h2 class="section__heading">When is the Next World Cup?</h2>
<p>The next World Cup will take place from Thursday, June 11 to Sunday, July 19, 2026. The tournament will be hosted across the United States, Canada, and Mexico, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches over 39 days. Below are some key details about the 2026 World Cup schedule.</p>
<ul>
<li>The 2026 World Cup will be the first to take place with 48 teams, expanded from 32 in 2022.</li>
<li>For the group stage, teams will be divided into twelve groups of four teams.</li>
<li>The top two teams from each group plus the eight best third place teams will proceed to the (new) Round of 32.</li>
<li>All matches after the group stage will be knockout format.</li>
<li>A total of 104 matches will be played, up from 64 at the 2022 edition.</li>
<li>The 2026 World Cup groups were finalized following the Final Draw on December 5, 2025 and the final qualifying matches on March 31, 2026.</li>
<li>The games will take place in <a title="https://www.roadtrips.com/world-cup/2026-world-cup-packages/venues/#section-where-is-the-2026-world-cup-final-stadium" href="https://www.roadtrips.com/world-cup/2026-world-cup-packages/venues/#section-where-is-the-2026-world-cup-final-stadium" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">16 venues</a> throughout Canada, Mexico, and the USA.</li>
<li>The 2026 World Cup Final will take place on July 19, 2026.</li>
</ul>
</div>
						
						
					</div>
				</div>

			</div><!-- .container -->

		</section>

					<div class="side__content col-md">

						
						<div class="content"><h2 class="section__heading">2026 World Cup Groups: Full Finalized Group List</h2>
<p>The 2026 World Cup groups are now set, following the World Cup 2026 Final Draw on December 5, 2025 and the final qualifying matches played on March 31, 2026. The tournament will feature 48 teams split into 12 groups of four, with the top two teams in each group plus the eight best third-place teams advancing to the Round of 32. Below is the full group-by-group breakdown for the 2026 World Cup.</p>
<p><span style="color: #2e7d32; font-weight: bold;">Group A</span>: Mexico, South Africa, Korea Republic, Czechia<br>
<span style="color: #c62828; font-weight: bold;">Group B</span>: Canada, Switzerland, Qatar, Bosnia and Herzegovina<br>
<span style="color: #f9a825; font-weight: bold;">Group C</span>: Brazil, Morocco, Haiti, Scotland<br>
<span style="color: #1565c0; font-weight: bold;">Group D</span>: United States, Paraguay, Australia, <span data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">Türkiye</span><br>
<span style="color: #000000; font-weight: bold;">Group E</span>: Germany, Curaçao, Côte d’Ivoire, Ecuador<br>
<span style="color: #ef6c00; font-weight: bold;">Group F</span>: Netherlands, Japan, Tunisia, Sweden<br>
<span style="color: #795548; font-weight: bold;">Group G</span>: Belgium, Egypt, Iran, New Zealand<br>
<span style="color: #8e0000; font-weight: bold;">Group H</span>: Spain, Cabo Verde, Saudi Arabia, Uruguay<br>
<span style="color: #a1887f; font-weight: bold;">Group I</span>: France, Senegal, Norway, Iraq<br>
<span style="color: #64b5f6; font-weight: bold;">Group J</span>: Argentina, Algeria, Austria, Jordan<br>
<span style="color: #4e342e; font-weight: bold;">Group K</span>: Portugal, Uzbekistan, Colombia, Congo DR<br>
<span style="color: #1e88e5; font-weight: bold;">Group L</span>: England, Croatia, Ghana, Panama</p>
</div>

<h2 class="section__heading" style="margin-top: 80px;">When is the Draw for the 2026 World Cup​?</h2>

</li>
</ul><h3><b>🏆 Knockout Stage – Round of 32</b></h3><div>Canada’s Round of 32 opponent and match location will depend on their final standing in <b>Group B</b>.</div><h2>🥇 <b>If Canada finishes as Group B Winner</b></h2><ul>
<li><strong>Match 85 — Group B Winner vs Best Third-Place Team (from Groups E/F/G/I/J)</strong>
<ul>
<li>Date: July 2, 2026</li>
<li>Kickoff: 8:00 PM local</li>
<li>Venue: BC Place</li>
<li>City: Vancouver, British Columbia</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul><h2>🥈 <b>If Canada finishes as Group B Runner-Up</b></h2><ul>
<li><strong>Match 73 — Group B Runner-Up vs Group A Runner-Up</strong>
<ul>
<li>Date: June 28, 2026</li>
<li>Kickoff: 12:00 PM local</li>
<li>Venue: SoFi Stadium</li>
<li>City: Los Angeles, California</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
											</div>
				</div>

			</div>

		</section>

		
		<section id="section-2026-world-cup-ticketing-notice" class="footnotes">

			<div class="container-xxl">

				<div class="meta"><h2 class="section__heading">2026 World Cup Ticketing Notice</h2></div>
				<div class="content"><p>Roadtrips is in no way affiliated or associated with FIFA, FIFA World Cup 2026™, or On Location. Tickets to the FIFA World Cup 2026™ are limited to FIFA, On Location, and the authorized sales agents in your country of residence. Roadtrips is not an authorized sales agent for the FIFA World Cup 2026™ and therefore we do not include tickets in our base travel packages.</p>
<p>The official website for FIFA World Cup 2026™ is <a href="http://fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026">fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026</a>. Details on ticket categories, matches, and how to purchase tickets for the World Cup can be found on the FIFA website.</p>
<p>Roadtrips is committed to providing personalized, high-touch service throughout your experience. We will tailor your itinerary to align with your chosen FIFA World Cup 2026™ matches, whether or not you have already secured your tickets. With over 30 years of experience providing travel packages to the world’s biggest sporting events, you can trust we have the knowledge and expertise to provide a personalized, comprehensive travel package to the FIFA World Cup 2026™.</p>
</div>
			</div>

		</section>

                        // Ensure blank images don't trigger errors
                        img.onerror = function() {

                            }
                        };
                        // Double-ensure data attributes are preserved
                        if (img.dataset.src && !img.getAttribute("data-src")) {
                            img.setAttribute("data-src", img.dataset.src);
                        }
                        if (img.dataset.srcset && !img.getAttribute("data-srcset")) {
                            img.setAttribute("data-srcset", img.dataset.srcset);
                        }
                    }
                }

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

                            source.setAttribute('srcset', source.getAttribute('data-srcset'));

                }

                if (element.complete && (element.naturalWidth === 0 || element.getAttribute('src') === 'data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7')) {
                    // Try to force reload if image is broken
                    if (element.getAttribute('data-src')) {
                        element.setAttribute('src', element.getAttribute('data-src'));
                    }
                }
            });
            
            // Force initialization of any images that might have been missed
            lazySizes.init();

id="ot-pc-title">Privacy Preference Center</h2><div id="ot-pc-desc">When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
            <br><a href="https://www.roadtrips.com/privacy-policy/" class="privacy-notice-link" rel="noopener" target="_blank" aria-label="More information about your privacy, opens in a new tab">View our Cookie & Privacy Policy</a></div><button id="accept-recommended-btn-handler">Allow All</button><section class="ot-sdk-row ot-cat-grp"><h3 id="ot-category-title"> Manage Consent Preferences</h3><div class="ot-accordion-layout ot-cat-item ot-vs-config" data-optanongroupid="C0001"><button aria-expanded="false" ot-accordion="true" aria-controls="ot-desc-id-C0001" aria-labelledby="ot-header-id-C0001 ot-status-id-C0001"></button><!-- Accordion header --><div class="ot-acc-hdr ot-always-active-group"><div class="ot-plus-minus"><span></span><span></span></div><h4 class="ot-cat-header" id="ot-header-id-C0001">Strictly Necessary Cookies</h4><div id="ot-status-id-C0001" class="ot-always-active">Always Active</div></div><!-- accordion detail --><div class="ot-acc-grpcntr ot-acc-txt"><p class="ot-acc-grpdesc ot-category-desc" id="ot-desc-id-C0001">These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.</p></div></div><div class="ot-accordion-layout ot-cat-item ot-vs-config" data-optanongroupid="C0002"><button aria-expanded="false" ot-accordion="true" aria-controls="ot-desc-id-C0002" aria-labelledby="ot-header-id-C0002"></button><!-- Accordion header --><div class="ot-acc-hdr"><div class="ot-plus-minus"><span></span><span></span></div><h4 class="ot-cat-header" id="ot-header-id-C0002">Performance Cookies</h4><div class="ot-tgl"><input type="checkbox" name="ot-group-id-C0002" id="ot-group-id-C0002" role="switch" class="category-switch-handler" data-optanongroupid="C0002" checked="" aria-labelledby="ot-header-id-C0002"> <label class="ot-switch" for="ot-group-id-C0002"><span class="ot-switch-nob"></span> <span class="ot-label-txt">Performance Cookies</span></label> </div></div><!-- accordion detail --><div class="ot-acc-grpcntr ot-acc-txt"><p class="ot-acc-grpdesc ot-category-desc" id="ot-desc-id-C0002">These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.</p></div></div><div class="ot-accordion-layout ot-cat-item ot-vs-config" data-optanongroupid="C0004"><button aria-expanded="false" ot-accordion="true" aria-controls="ot-desc-id-C0004" aria-labelledby="ot-header-id-C0004"></button><!-- Accordion header --><div class="ot-acc-hdr"><div class="ot-plus-minus"><span></span><span></span></div><h4 class="ot-cat-header" id="ot-header-id-C0004">Targeting Cookies</h4><div class="ot-tgl"><input type="checkbox" name="ot-group-id-C0004" id="ot-group-id-C0004" role="switch" class="category-switch-handler" data-optanongroupid="C0004" checked="" aria-labelledby="ot-header-id-C0004"> <label class="ot-switch" for="ot-group-id-C0004"><span class="ot-switch-nob"></span> <span class="ot-label-txt">Targeting Cookies</span></label> </div></div><!-- accordion detail --><div class="ot-acc-grpcntr ot-acc-txt"><p class="ot-acc-grpdesc ot-category-desc" id="ot-desc-id-C0004">These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners.
